caution_zones.title: West Lee Sink — Rotor Risk
caution_zones.description: Mechanical turbulence in the direct lee of Pine Tree Line. Active whenever surface westerly > 20 km/h. Expect strong asymmetric gusts and sink up to -4 m/s.

caution_zones.title: South Bowl Overdevelopment Risk
caution_zones.description: When cloud cover rises above 65% over the South Bowl, thermals become erratic and overdevelopment cumulus may produce strong inflow. Abort approach if bases are below 2100m AGL.
caution_zones.conflict_description: Cloud agent (caution-overdevelopment) partially conflicts with weather agent (moderate thermal index)

caution_zones.title: Tehachapi Creek Cross-Wind Corridor
caution_zones.description: Creek drainage channelises afternoon sea breeze from the SW. Unexpected directional shear at 1280–1350m AMSL, particularly between 14:00–17:00 local. Affect transitions between main ridge and landing zone.

caution_zones.title: High Wind Advisory — Main Launch
caution_zones.description: Surface winds at Eagle Ridge Main Launch > 30 km/h. Launch is not recommended. Ground handling practice only.
